Since `/workspace/` isn't in the allowed directories, I'll use `/tmp/mcp-workspace/network_debug.log` instead. I'll add logging configuration and update `process_packet` to append each DNS query's details to the log file.

 # Third-party imports
 from scapy.all import sniff, DNS, DNSQR, DNSRR, IP, UDP
 
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

+# Note: /workspace/ is not writable in this environment, so we log to

+LOG_FILE_PATH = "/tmp/mcp-workspace/network_debug.log"
 
+# Configure a dedicated logger that appends to the log file.
+dns_logger = logging.getLogger("dns_monitor")
+dns_logger.setLevel(logging.INFO)
+
+# Avoid adding duplicate handlers if the module is imported multiple times.
+if not dns_logger.handlers:
+    _file_handler = logging.FileHandler(LOG_FILE_PATH, mode="a", encoding="utf-8")
+    _file_handler.setLevel(logging.INFO)
+    _file_handler.setFormatter(
+        logging.Formatter("%(asctime)s | %(message)s", datefmt="%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S")
+    )
+    dns_logger.addHandler(_file_handler)
+
